summary: The diff implements both REQ-12 and REQ-13 reasonably well. The backend removes credit deduction logic and the GENERATION_COST/creditBalances state fields via migration, and generation endpoints no longer decrement credits. The frontend removes credit-gate checks, always enables the Generate button, and replaces cost-per-generation messaging with 'Unlimited generations'. Admin credit-adjustment hooks remain intact in useQueries.ts. Stripe flows are untouched.
